pi_items.source: Biopython restriction analysis and sequence inspection of J01749.1 confirming BamHI recognition sequence GGATCC starts at nucleotide 375 (1-based), with cut site between 375 and 376.
NCBI Nucleotide search and download confirming J01749.1 is the valid accession for cloning vector pBR322.
Inspection of NCBI GenBank record J01749.1 which explicitly lists 4361 bp as the sequence length.
Task instructions and setup_task.sh which fetches both the vector and human insulin gene (NM_000207.3) directly from the NCBI E-utilities API.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real genomic data downloaded directly from NCBI Nucleotide. The pBR322 cloning vector (Accession J01749.1) has an exact length of 4361 base pairs. The human insulin gene sequence (Accession NM_000207.3) is inserted exactly after nucleotide position 375, which corresponds to the precise cut site of the BamHI restriction enzyme (between 375 and 376 within the GGATCC sequence).
